description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Spack Builds that triggers on push events. Run a job on an ubuntu-20.04 environment with a spack/ubuntu-focal:latest container, using a matrix strategy to build HiOp with Spack for different specs. Checkout the repository with submodules, set up the Spack environment, add mirrors, create and activate a Spack environment, add and develop HiOp, concretize and install with Spack.
